name: Bega Cheese Limited
analysis: BGA's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 13% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$5.7900, stop A$5.3856, target A$6.3700 (1.43:1) — then trail it.
